meaning: adv.坏透地,不愉快地,顽皮地
examples: And said, I pray you, brethren, do not so wickedly.
Will ye speak wickedly for God? And talk deceitfully for him?
It was for your sake I came; and it will be wickedly ungrateful if you refuse.
It also plans to build up its strength in wealth management (for the truly, wickedly rich).
They were wickedly strong too, if the thickness and anatomy of their fossilized bones are any indication.
